description: PFC-Core releasable components. The unified registry indexes all platform artifacts (ontologies, agents, UI/UX, DB, media, docs). Each component can be independently enabled for release. PFI instances receive filtered snapshots based on their subscribed series.

ontology-registry.description: Filtered ontology registry snapshot — entries filtered by PFI's subscribed ontologySeries

visualiser.description: Embeddable ontology visualiser (12 ES modules, vis-network v9.1.2)

agents.description: OAA agent system prompts and configurations

design-system.description: Design system token taxonomy and brand foundations

versionFile.description: Contains the PFC-Core release tag (e.g., pfc-v1.0.0). Separate from azlan-workflow-version (convention pin).

targetingSource.description: Targets are read from ont-registry-index.json pfiInstances array. Each PFI declares its dev repo, subscribed series, and version pin.
